caption: A man with short dark hair and a beard is seated in a recording studio against a background of grey, ribbed acoustic foam panels. He is wearing black over-ear headphones and a black jacket over a grey shirt. A professional studio microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of him. As the sequence progresses, the man transitions from a state of contemplation with his eyes closed to an expressive gesture, raising his left hand and smiling while looking toward someone off-screen. He then shifts his gaze and expression, looking upward and then to the side with a more neutral, attentive look. The camera remains static throughout, focusing on the man's upper body and facial expressions as he interacts with an unseen presence in the studio.
